title: ectasis filiformls
side_effects: Ectasis filiformls can have side effects if used improperly, such as severe allergic reactions, skin irritation, and gastrointestinal problems. In some cases, it may cause dizziness, nausea, and vomiting due to its toxic properties. Improper use of the plant may also lead to kidney or liver damage, and in rare instances, it can cause respiratory failure. If not handled or consumed correctly, ectasis filiformls can have serious consequences for one's health.
